name: risutoki
description: RisuAI .charx file editor with integrated terminal and MomoTalk UI

scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.prestart: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer
scripts.lint: npx eslint main.js test/test-rpack.js test/test-charx.js test/test-reference-store.js test/test-refs-popout-data.js test/test-popout-payload-store.js test/test-terminal-shell.js test/test-main-state-store.js src/charx-io.ts src/rpack.ts toki-mcp-server.ts src/app/controller.js src/popout/controller.js src/lib/dialog.ts src/lib/context-menu.ts src/lib/menu-bar.ts src/lib/dark-mode.ts src/lib/bgm.ts src/lib/editor-activation.ts src/lib/editor-activation.test.ts src/lib/external-text-tab.ts src/lib/external-text-tab.test.ts src/lib/main-state-store.cjs src/lib/preview-engine.ts src/lib/refs-popout-data.cjs src/lib/popout-payload-store.cjs src/lib/terminal-shell.cjs src/lib/app-settings.ts src/lib/app-settings.test.ts src/lib/assistant-launch.ts src/lib/assistant-launch.test.ts src/lib/asset-prompt-template.ts src/lib/asset-prompt-template.test.ts src/lib/asset-runtime.ts src/lib/asset-runtime.test.ts src/lib/avatar.ts src/lib/chat-session.ts src/lib/chat-session.test.ts src/lib/editor-dirty-fields.ts src/lib/editor-dirty-fields.test.ts src/lib/image-viewer.ts src/lib/indexed-tabs.ts src/lib/indexed-tabs.test.ts src/lib/tab-manager.ts src/lib/tab-manager.test.ts src/lib/layout-manager.ts src/lib/layout-manager.test.ts src/lib/mcp-data-update.ts src/lib/mcp-data-update.test.ts src/lib/monaco-loader.ts src/lib/popout-state.ts src/lib/popout-state.test.ts src/lib/preview-debug.ts src/lib/preview-debug.test.ts src/lib/preview-format.ts src/lib/preview-format.test.ts src/lib/preview-session.ts src/lib/preview-session.test.ts src/lib/runtime-feedback.ts src/lib/script-loader.ts src/lib/status-bar.ts src/lib/help-popup.ts src/lib/settings-popup.ts src/lib/backup-store.ts src/lib/form-editor.ts src/lib/sidebar-builder.ts src/lib/sidebar-builder.test.ts src/lib/terminal-chat.ts src/lib/terminal-chat.test.ts src/lib/terminal-ui.ts src/lib/terminal-ui.test.ts src/lorebook-convert.ts src/lorebook-convert.test.ts preload.ts popout-preload.ts --max-warnings=0 && npx eslint src/main.ts src/popout.ts src/App.vue src/App.test.ts vite.config.ts vitest.setup.ts --max-warnings=0
scripts.test:references: node test/test-reference-store.js && node test/test-refs-popout-data.js && node test/test-popout-payload-store.js && node test/test-terminal-shell.js && node test/test-main-state-store.js
scripts.test: npm run build:node-libs && npm run test-rpack && npm run test-charx && npm run test:references && npm run test:unit
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dist: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder
scripts.dist:portable: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist:installer: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:all: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win nsis portable

author: toki
